svg.text: three independent backup layers — any one can restore the entire platform

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Supabase automated backup work?')
sendPrompt('What is Supabase PITR and when do we need it?')
sendPrompt('How do we restore Supabase after data loss?')
sendPrompt('How does Coolify backup Docker volumes?')
sendPrompt('Where does Coolify send Docker volume backups?')
sendPrompt('How do we restore the Droplet from backup?')
sendPrompt('How are R2 files protected from accidental deletion?')
sendPrompt('How are critical documents stored redundantly?')
sendPrompt('How do we recover files from R2?')
sendPrompt('What is the overall RPO and RTO for NearBy?')
g.text: RPO: 5 min (PITR) · RTO: <2 hrs · Total backup cost: ~$105/mo at Stage 2
